callGraph.callee:
(
        await db.execute(
            select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
            .join(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id,
            )
            .where(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion.warehouse_map_id == warehouse_map_id,
                WarehouseLayoutVersion.status == "locked",
            )
        )
    ).all

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
            .join(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id,
            )
            .where

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
            .join

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join

(
        await db.execute(
            select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
            .where(WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == layout.id)
            .order_by(
                WarehouseAisle.code,
                WarehouseRack.code,
                WarehouseShelf.level,
                WarehouseBin.code,
            )
        )
    ).all

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
            .where(WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == layout.id)
            .order_by

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
            .where

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join

(
            await db.execute(
                select(WarehouseScanTarget)
                .where(*clauses)
                .order_by(
                    WarehouseScanTarget.priority.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.aisle_code.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.rack_code.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.bin_code.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.id.asc(),
                )
                .limit(limit)
                .offset(offset)
            )
        )
        .scalars()
        .all

(
            await db.execute(
                select(WarehouseScanTarget)
                .where(*clauses)
                .order_by(
                    WarehouseScanTarget.priority.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.aisle_code.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.rack_code.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.bin_code.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.id.asc(),
                )
                .limit(limit)
                .offset(offset)
            )
        )
        .scalars

select(WarehouseScanTarget)
                .where(*clauses)
                .order_by(
                    WarehouseScanTarget.priority.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.aisle_code.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.rack_code.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.bin_code.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.id.asc(),
                )

select(WarehouseScanTarget)

                    WarehouseScanTarget.priority.asc(),

                    WarehouseScanTarget.rack_code.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.bin_code.asc(),
                    WarehouseScanTarget.id.asc(),
                )
                .limit

(
        await db.execute(
            select(WarehouseAsset)
            .join(WarehouseModel, WarehouseAsset.model_id == WarehouseModel.id)
            .where(
                WarehouseModel.warehouse_map_id == int(warehouse_map_id),
                WarehouseAsset.type == STRUCTURE_ASSET_TYPE,
            )
            .order_by(WarehouseAsset.id.desc())
            .limit(1)
        )
    ).scalar_one_or_none

select(WarehouseAsset)
            .join(WarehouseModel, WarehouseAsset.model_id == WarehouseModel.id)
            .where(
                WarehouseModel.warehouse_map_id == int(warehouse_map_id),
                WarehouseAsset.type == STRUCTURE_ASSET_TYPE,
            )
            .order_by(WarehouseAsset.id.desc())
            .limit

select(WarehouseAsset)
            .join(WarehouseModel, WarehouseAsset.model_id == WarehouseModel.id)
            .where(
                WarehouseModel.warehouse_map_id == int(warehouse_map_id),
                WarehouseAsset.type == STRUCTURE_ASSET_TYPE,
            )
            .order_by

(
        await db.execute(
            select(WarehouseLayoutVersion)
            .where(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion.warehouse_map_id == warehouse_map_id,
                WarehouseLayoutVersion.status == "locked",
            )
            .order_by(WarehouseLayoutVersion.version.desc())
            .limit(1)
        )
    ).scalar_one_or_none

(
        await db.execute(
            select(WarehouseCoordinateFrame)
            .where(
                WarehouseCoordinateFrame.warehouse_map_id == warehouse_map_id,
                WarehouseCoordinateFrame.status == "locked",

            .order_by(WarehouseCoordinateFrame.version.desc())

(
        await db.execute(
            select(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,

            )
            .join(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id)

            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
            .where(*clauses)

    ).one_or_none

select(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle,
                WarehouseRack,
                WarehouseShelf,
                WarehouseBin,
            )
            .join(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
            .where

select(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle,
                WarehouseRack,
                WarehouseShelf,
                WarehouseBin,
            )
            .join(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
            .join

select(

                WarehouseRack,
                WarehouseShelf,
                WarehouseBin,
            )
            .join(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id)
            .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
            .join

select(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle,
                WarehouseRack,
                WarehouseShelf,
                WarehouseBin,
            )
            .join(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == WarehouseLayoutVersion.id)
            .join

select(
                WarehouseLayoutVersion,
                WarehouseAisle,
                WarehouseRack,
                WarehouseShelf,
                WarehouseBin,
            )
            .join

(
            await db.execute(
                select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
                .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
                .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
                .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
                .where(
                    WarehouseAisle.layout_version_id == current.id,
                    WarehouseBin.provenance_status.in_(("manual", "confirmed")),
                )
            )
        ).all

select(WarehouseAisle, WarehouseRack, WarehouseShelf, WarehouseBin)
                .join(WarehouseRack, WarehouseRack.aisle_id == WarehouseAisle.id)
                .join(WarehouseShelf, WarehouseShelf.rack_id == WarehouseRack.id)
                .join(WarehouseBin, WarehouseBin.shelf_id == WarehouseShelf.id)
